Ntc Of Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christine Wagner, Esq., of the Law Office of Christine Wagner, Tel. 707.367.1709, appearing for petitioner and moving party.
Victoria Wong, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4721, appearing for respondent and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court vacated its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER GREG SCHOEPP, DBA BAY AREA COMPASSION HEALTH CARE CENTER, INC.'S Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs is granted. Petitioner needs to know what costs it is facing. $410 is legitimate cost. With $250 already paid by petitioner, $160 in cost is still owed by petitioner to City. Counsel for respondent to prepare order and judgment. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153
